item.title: Washington Post. . A large fire almost completely destroyed a luxury hotel in the Dominican Republic, killing one tourist and injuring dozens. The cause of the fire remains under investigation. https://wapo.st/44o3fYy - facebook.com

item.title: The New York Times. . A large fire in the Dominican Republic on Friday killed at least one person and destroyed a popular beachfront hotel, emergency officials said. Nearly 1,700 guests were evacuated. https://trib.al/bJnfe8v - facebook.com
